reviews.review_msg: RECOMMEND! He did not make us get a textbook for the class. Assignments were straightforward and fair. Marking was fair. He made lectures interesting and worth attending. Main component was a group project, so the strength of your group will determine your mark. Note: He was an industry specialist with an Bachelor's degree, not a usual professor.

It is hard to overstate how bad this instructor is at teaching and organizing a class. She is unorganized, never teaches, and gives insanely difficult tests with material not covered in class. It felt like we learned NOTHING all semester, and testing was outrageously hard and no one ever finished. BY FAR the worst instructor I've had. 

BE WARNED!
The most unclear prof i have ever met. Avoid this prof!!!!!!!!!!!! Hard to communicate with heavy assignments !!!!!! And the grading outline is also unclear! Avoid !

TL;DR: Shawn is a great lecturer and an even greater person. You'll learn lots +100. Took this course Spring 2017. Shawn is very approachable. Lectures were well organized and presented. He understood how to communicate in a way that most people would understand and related topics back to relevant industry topics, making his teachings invaluable.
